heading: Nonapplication of audit requirements
label: 151108 Nonapplication of audit requirements
text: The audit requirements of do not apply to the corporation.section 10101 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)151108(no source).This section is added to except the National Education Association of the United States from the application of section 10101 of the revised title, restating 36:1101–1103, which imposes audit requirements on certain federally chartered corporations. The Association is not included in the list of corporations set out in 36:1101 to which the audit requirements apply.
